title: option to save or not save  draft emails
excerpt:
Description
allow the user to save or NOT save emails as DRAFT. currently the platorms saves by default 
What are you trying to achieve
follow standard email client’s feature that allow you to chose to save draft emails. …

posts.author: Tredfr (Tred Rowland)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

allow the user to save or NOT save emails as DRAFT. currently the platorms saves by default

What are you trying to achieve

follow standard email client’s feature that allow you to chose to save draft emails.
